title: paspalum standleyi
intro: Paspalum standleyi, also known as Standley's paspalum, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and skin disorders, due to its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Paspalum standleyi include reducing inflammation, fighting infections, and promoting wound healing. The herbal preparations of this plant are often used in the form of teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are typically consumed orally or applied topically to the affected area.
